zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏弱
zh.content:
当前ETH围绕1760-1765区间窄幅震荡，价格略低于20日均线，短线结构偏震荡偏弱，但尚未形成明确下行趋势动能不足

MACD小幅为正但动能有限，未形成明显多头发散。价格持续受制于20日均线1773附近，反弹力度偏弱，缺乏量能配合延续震荡

下方支撑关注1760与1750区域，失守或回测1740。上方阻力1773及1785，突破需放量验证

操作建议以区间为主，1760-1750分批低吸，反弹1773-1785逐步止盈，跌破1750止损

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation around 1762, showing minimal volatility and a marginal 0.13% daily gain. The broader intraday structure remains neutral-to-slightly bearish as price sits below the 20-period SMA at 1773.45. This positioning suggests that recent upward attempts are losing momentum, while buyers are still defending short-term equilibrium. Overall trend reflects a corrective phase within a wider sideways range rather than a decisive directional move.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but subdued picture. MACD at 0.063 indicates a slight bullish bias; however, the absence of a clearly defined signal line reading limits confirmation strength. Price action hovering near recent lows suggests RSI would likely sit near neutral mid-range if available. Overall, momentum is weak and lacks conviction, implying that neither buyers nor sellers currently control direction decisively.

Key levels are tightly clustered due to the current compression phase. Immediate support is located at 1760, followed by a stronger demand zone around 1750 and deeper support near 1725. On the upside, resistance begins at 1765, aligning with the recent high, while the 20-SMA at 1773 acts as the first dynamic barrier. A sustained break above 1773 could open 1785 and 1800 targets.

Trading conditions favor range strategies while price remains trapped below the 20-SMA. Short-term traders may consider buying near 1760 support with tight stops below 1750, targeting a rebound toward 1773. Conversely, rejection at resistance could offer short setups with limited risk toward mid-range support. A breakout above 1773 with volume confirmation would shift bias bullish, while failure to reclaim it maintains neutral-to-bearish structure.
